full_text: Here's how I turn X into my inspiration database instead of mindlessly scrolling I'm constantly actively collecting ideas that I can act on as I'm browsing on X The key is all the names need to turn into actual action for example this is products Ill need to use content I need to read designs and videos I can reference later I to execute etc For example products to check how every time I see cool new AI products launch I bookmark here sometimes I'm on the phone and maybe I'm on the go I don't have time to immediately check it out but once I'm,At my desk, I will make sure to go through it and actually use these products. This is how I find out about cool new AI applications.This is cool articles or content I want to read later Laun videos is also important because sometimes when you want to make a video and you need to find a reference for the style you want, it's often easier to start with references of other people's videos but oftentimes I just forget where I saw those cool videos so now when I see cool videos on my timeline I make sure to bookmark them into this folder so that later when I'm making my own videos I can clearly point to some styles that I want same thing with design because I'm not a designer by training I often find it hard to articulate.Good design to AI tools I found it to be really useful to bookmark other people's good designs to train my eye and also to help me articulate the type of styles I like X has a lot of good prompts whenever I see other people's good prompts I save them and try for myself later and then vibe coding ideas a lot of my vibe coding ideas are actually inspired by other developers who built really cool projects these are really inspiring I can get your creative juices flowing I think the key to turning X into your inspiration engine.I to make sure your timeline is high quality That it's not just slob or clickbait. I actually took the time and effort to train my X algorithm So every time I see Slob or clickbait, I actually click on the three dots and not interested. and every time I see really cool stuff I make sure to bookmark like it or reply So over time the algorithm learns to push the kind of high quality content to your timeline so that now when I'm on the platform I feel like my time is very well spent it's actually very educational and inspirational experience.
